etched_record.title: Craft an Etched music disc (Etched mod — engrave custom music onto a disc)

xerca_instrument.title: Obtain or craft a Xerca instrument (Xerca mod — playable instruments for settlements)

subtitle.text: The previous civilizations left artifacts. You are leaving music. That is a different kind of inheritance.

description: Etched lets you engrave music from any audio source onto custom discs.
Your kingdom now has a soundtrack.
Lutes, flutes, harps, and other instruments that produce real audio.
They can be played manually or through note blocks.
MCA Reborn villagers in your settlement will respond to music.
Music is not a survival mechanic.
The first human settlements had music before they had agriculture.
Music is earlier than farming. It is earlier than building.
It is what people do when they have enough.
